calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-30-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Bruce Chan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Kelly Sweeney, Esq. for Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., a National Banking Assoc.
Plaintiff's Witnee Leo Holloway, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Ramin Malekian as follows:
Damages $53,296.67
Prejudgment Interest $2,977.24
Attorney Fees $2,900.00
Costs $385.00, for a total of $59,558.91
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2008 Continued To Nov-07-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
